summary: Phase B-2 (Template Support) and Phase B-3 (Delivery Closure) testing complete. All features verified working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for UUID-format invoice IDs (pre-existing issue from iteration 281)

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

seed_data_creation: Created test delivery note ID: 69dba545db1611f373410bb8 for closure workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B-2 and B-3 verified. Template support working - 4 templates (classic, modern, compact, premium) selectable in Settings Hub with visual preview cards. Delivery closure workflow working with receiver_name, receiver_designation, receiver_signature fields captured via modal with signature pad.

details: Settings Hub Document Template tab shows 4 visual template preview cards (Classic Corporate, Modern Clean, Compact Commercial, Premium Branded)
Each card shows mini document mockup with template-specific styling
Template selection persists when saved via PUT /api/admin/settings-hub
GET /api/documents/render-settings returns doc_template.selected_template
CanonicalDocumentRenderer applies different styling based on selected template (verified with premium template showing gold accents)
Template changes apply to all document previews (Quote, Invoice, Delivery Note)
Settings Hub Document Footer tab shows toggle fields (show_address, show_email, show_phone, show_registration)
Live Footer Preview section reflects toggle states in real-time
Custom Footer Text field available
Footer settings persist when saved
Confirm Delivery button visible on delivery notes with status 'issued' or 'in_transit'
Clicking Confirm Delivery opens modal with title 'Confirm Delivery — Sign-Off'
Modal contains Receiver Name input (required)
Modal contains Designation / Title input (optional)
Modal contains Digital Signature canvas with touch/mouse drawing support
Clear and Accept Signature buttons functional
Cancel and Confirm Delivery buttons present
PATCH /api/admin/delivery-notes/{id}/status accepts receiver_name, receiver_designation, receiver_signature fields
After closure, status changes to 'delivered' and received_at timestamp is set
Receiver confirmation card appears on delivery note preview page after closure
Receiver info (name, designation, signature, date) renders inside the canonical document
Quote preview page loads at /admin/quotes/{id}
CanonicalDocumentRenderer renders with QUOTATION header
Download PDF button functional
Invoice preview page loads at /admin/invoices/{id}
CanonicalDocumentRenderer renders with INVOICE header
Download PDF button functional
